votes.reason: A cross-lane readiness matrix gives the control plane one bounded view of Toolchain ownership and future integration gates without implying runtime behavior.
The matrix preserves the existing jai-pilot, vscode-nexus, and api-nexus boundaries while making denied authority and SoT limits easier to inspect.
This is static coordination only, keeps api-nexus JSONL repo-local, and leaves runtime integration, polling, and execution explicitly unauthorized.
